results.title: Four-goal Gainsborough Trinity off to a winning start at Frickley Athletic
results.description: Two goals in each half handed Gainsborough Trinity a routine 4-0 victory at Frickley Athletic in their opening pre-season friendly on Saturday.

results.title: On the ___ (fleeing) Crossword Clue
results.description: Answer help for Hang Ten, featuring one of today's clues: On the ___ (fleeing), from USA TODAY Daily Crossword Puzzle creators.

results.title: 'Exciting season ahead' - Sheffield United's Sydie Peck outlines hope amid West Ham transfer talk
results.description: Sheffield United’s Sydie Peck has shared his pre-season hope amid doubts over his future

results.title: Derbyshire talisman Wayne Madsen signs off with T20 Blast win
results.description: Pakistan fast bowler Akif Javed returned T20 best figures to give Wayne Madsen a winning send off as Derbyshire Falcons cruised to a seven wicket Vitality Blast victory over Leicestershire Foxes at the OurCoop County Ground.

results.title: Quiet! Crossword Clue

results.title: Bargain: England World Cup semi tickets vs Argentina just $2,700
results.description: Deep-pocketed fans can watch England in the Fifa World Cup semi-final against Argentina for $2,700. England earned a spot in their second World Cup semi-final in three tournaments with a nervy 2-1 extra-time victory over Norway on Saturday night and have been rewarded with a last four tie against the defending champions Argentina. The semi-final [...]
